reviews.review_description: I like it, plz update it so multiplayer can work

reviews.review_title: Very good game love it! But one thing.
reviews.review_description: The maps and very thing is good and amazing I must say but I think they honestly need to be a lil bigger for more players but keep going! I can see this game is going to look amazing soon so don’t be down or give up on it, keep going I really think you should. It’s an amazing game and anyone who’s looking at this. I think you should really try to. You’ll probably very much love it!￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for liking our game.

reviews.review_description: Yall did a good job on this, just wish more people played it. Still W game though.
This game is just like can mania goes hard

developer_response.body: sadly, we are not the creators of cat mania, but it is a good game.
